text:
re evaluating Sunapha etc.
10-11. RESULTS OF SUCH YOGAS CAUSED BY MARS ETC. If Sunapha Yoga is caused by
Mars (by being in the 2nd of the Moon), the native will be valorous, wealthy, cruel in speech,
be an Army chief, will be fierce, torturous, proud and inimical. If Mercury be the cause of
Sunapha Yoga, the native will be expert in Vedas, Shastras and music. He will be virtuous
38

and a poet. He will be high-minded, intent on thinking of good for all and will possess a
brilliant physique.
12-14. Should Jupiter cause Sunapha Yoga, a person so born will have high learning, will be
famous and himself be a king, or dear to a king. He will have a good family and have plenty
of wealth. Venus will give wife, lands, wealth, prowess, quadrupeds and valour. The native
will further be honoured by king and will also be courageous. Should Saturn be in the 2nd of
the Moon causing Sunapha Yoga, the native will be skillful, be worshipped by the people in
